subtopicsString: Understanding Performance Impact on Business and UX, Key Performance Metrics and KPIs (e.g., TTFB, FCP, LCP), Performance Monitoring Tools and Methodologies, Setting Performance Budgets and Goals, Web Vitals & User Experience: Deep Dive into LCP, FID, CLS, Frontend Performance Metrics & Tools: Image, Video, and Font Optimization, Critical Rendering Path and Render-Blocking Resources, Code Splitting, Tree Shaking, and Lazy Loading for JavaScript/CSS, Client-Side Caching and PWA Optimization, API Design and Optimization for Speed (REST, GraphQL), Backend Database Optimization (SQL/NoSQL): Indexing, Query Tuning, Database Schema Design for Performance, ORM Optimization and N+1 Query Problem Solutions, Efficient Data Serialization and Deserialization, Caching Strategies (Redis, CDN): In-Memory, Distributed, and Edge Caching, Implementing and Optimizing Content Delivery Networks (CDNs), Browser Caching with HTTP Headers, Asynchronous Processing & Message Queues: Task Queues (e.g., Celery) and Message Brokers (e.g., RabbitMQ), Designing Event-Driven Architectures, Vertical vs. Horizontal Scaling Strategies, Load Balancing & Horizontal Scaling: Algorithms, Implementations (Nginx, HAProxy), Database Scaling Techniques (Sharding, Replication, Clustering), Introduction to Microservices for Scalability, Designing for Fault Tolerance and High Availability
